PowerShell(node -e "const crypto = require\('crypto'\); const {privateKey, publicKey} = crypto.generateKeyPairSync\('ec', {namedCurve: 'prime256v1'}\); const priv = privateKey.export\({type:'pkcs8', format:'der'}\); const pub = publicKey.export\({type:'spki', format:'der'}\); const privB64 = Buffer.from\(priv.slice\(-32\)\).toString\('base64url'\); const pubB64 = Buffer.from\(pub.slice\(-65\)\).toString\('base64url'\); console.log\('VAPID_PRIVATE_KEY=' + privB64\); console.log\('VAPID_PUBLIC_KEY=' + pubB64\);" 2>&1)
